On.Terms: AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,00; IsStatus Windfury 0
AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,01; IsStatus Windfury 0
AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,02; IsStatus Windfury 0
AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,03; IsStatus Windfury 0
AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,04; IsStatus Windfury 0
AnimPlay; AnimPlaying Attack Attack,05; IsStatus Windfury 0

On.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce
AnimBracketStart SpawnPods Spell,Alternate,Start Spell,Alternate Spell,Alternate,End 0 2.000000 AsTimeScale
AnimBracketStart SpellShake Spell,Channel,Start Spell,Channel Spell,Channel,End 0 2.000000 AsTimeScale
